scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter @ftre/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @ftre/editor dev" "pnpm --filter @ftre/electron dev" "pnpm --filter @ftre/renderer dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron packages/electron/dist/main.js"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ftre/shared build && pnpm --filter @ftre/editor build && pnpm --filter @ftre/electron build && pnpm --filter @ftre/renderer build
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @ftre/shared clean && pnpm --filter @ftre/editor clean && pnpm --filter @ftre/electron clean && pnpm --filter @ftre/renderer clean && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.pack:full: npm run build && npm run bundle-backend && electron-builder --win --dir -c electron-builder-full.json
scripts.dist:full: npm run build && npm run bundle-backend && electron-builder --win -c electron-builder-full.json
